files.patch:
@@ -30,7 +30,7 @@ Handle the operational workflow around docs.tenzir.com changes. 6. Cross-link the pull requests using one shared compact footer pattern: - In the docs PR, append a final `...` footer block that links the code PR and references the same Linear issue(s), for example - `🛠️ Code PR: tenzir/tenzir#6048
🎫 References TNZ-150, TNZ-151`. + `⚙️ Code PR: tenzir/tenzir#6048
🎫 References TNZ-150, TNZ-151`. - In the code PR, append or extend the final `...` footer with `📚 Docs PR: tenzir/docs#261`. - Use GitHub shorthand for PR links in both directions, such as @@ -61,7 +61,7 @@ Docs PR example: ```markdown -🛠️ Code PR: tenzir/tenzir#1234
+⚙️ Code PR: tenzir/tenzir#1234
🎫 References TNZ-150, TNZ-151 ```
